subcodes.first_line: The Book calleth out to the world and summoneth all nations unto the Most Great Name, whereby the hearts of the multitude have been enraptured [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب ینادی فی العالم و یدع الامم الی الاسم الاعظم الذی به انجذبت افئده الملا
subcodes.subjects: @future of Haifa; of the Holy Land, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @power of the Manifestation of God, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
